## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About נקודת מבט
A business focused on image creation, which could encompass photography, digital art, illustration, AI-generated imagery, or graphic design. The specific niche, style, and creative direction are yet to be determined.

## Services/Products
- יצירת תמונות

## Target Audience
- יוצרי תוכן דיגיטלי
- סוכנויות שיווק
- מתכנני אירועים

## Industry
Photography / Image Creation
